mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bookmark ( user_id, schedule_id, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{scheduleId}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT s.id, s.user_id AS userId, s.title, s.description, s.category, s.region, s.detail_region AS detailRegion, s.chat_link AS chatLink, s.start_date AS startDate, s.end_date AS endDate, s.recruit_start_date AS recruitStartDate, s.recruit_end_date AS recruitEndDate, s.min_participants AS minParticipants, s.max_participants AS maxParticipants, s.current_participants AS currentParticipants, s.age_min AS ageMin, s.age_max AS ageMax, s.gender_limit AS genderLimit, s.total_price AS totalPrice, s.cost_type AS costType, s.thumbnail_image AS thumbnailImage, s.view_count AS viewCount, s.status, s.is_public AS isPublic, s.cancel_deadline AS cancelDeadline, s.created_at AS createdAt, s.updated_at AS updatedAt, s.deleted_at AS deletedAt, TRUE AS isBookmarked FROM bookmark b INNER JOIN schedule s ON s.id = b.schedule_id WHERE b.user_id = #{userId} AND s.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY b.created_at DESC, b.id DESC
